entities:
Keycloak | PRODUCT | Open-source identity and access management solution maintained by Red Hat
FastAPI | PRODUCT | Python web framework acting as the resource server in this OAuth2 integration
Red Hat | ORGANIZATION | Company that maintains the Keycloak identity management solution
OAuth2 | CONCEPT | Authorization framework used to delegate access between services
OpenID Connect | CONCEPT | Identity layer built on top of OAuth2 for authentication
JWT | CONCEPT | JSON Web Token format used to represent authenticated claims securely
python-keycloak | PRODUCT | Python library that simplifies Keycloak integration and token validation
OAuth2AuthorizationCodeBearer | CONCEPT | FastAPI class that handles the OAuth2 authorization code frontend flow
PKCE | CONCEPT | Proof Key for Code Exchange extension to OAuth2 required for public clients
HTTPException | CONCEPT | FastAPI exception class raised when token validation fails with HTTP 401
relations:
Keycloak | maintained_by | Red Hat | Keycloak is an open-source project maintained by Red Hat | 8

FastAPI | integrates_with | Keycloak | FastAPI acts as the resource server validating tokens issued by Keycloak | 8
python-keycloak | used_for | Keycloak | python-keycloak library simplifies Keycloak token retrieval and validation | 7
OAuth2AuthorizationCodeBearer | part_of | FastAPI | OAuth2AuthorizationCodeBearer is a FastAPI class for the authorization code flow | 8

JWT | used_by | Keycloak | Keycloak issues JWT tokens as the token format for authenticated sessions | 8
